name: ux-ui-mastery
description: The definitive UX/UI design mastery plugin for Claude Code. 19 skills, 55 references, 10 commands, 300K+ words of expert design knowledge. Build production components, audit cognitive load, critique designs, and ship Figma-to-code — all grounded in cognitive psychology, NNG heuristics, and cutting-edge 2025-2026 research.
author: Design Tribe Republic
